videos.headline: Vols add to lead with 14-yard TD in 3rd quarter
videos.description: Nico Iamaleava slots one to Mike Matthews for a 14-yard touchdown to increase Tennessee's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vols add to lead with 14-yard TD in 3rd quarter) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tennessee's ridiculous INT followed up by a Vandy pick
videos.description: Jermod McCoy picks off Vanderbilt's Diego Pavia in the end zone, then, on the next play, Martel Hight picks off Tennessee's Nico Iamaleava.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Tennessee's ridiculous INT followed up by a Vandy pick) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Vandy takes opening kickoff to the house
videos.description: Junior Sherrill returns Tennessee's opening kick 100 yards for a Vanderbilt touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vandy takes opening kickoff to the house) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Vanderbilt scores on next drive to make it 14-0
videos.description: Sedrick Alexander forces his way into the end zone for a 4-yard touchdown for Vanderbilt.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vanderbilt scores on next drive to make it 14-0) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Vols answer on next drive with a 28-yard TD
videos.description: Nico Iamaleava passes to Dont'e Thornton Jr. for a 28-yard Tennessee touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vols answer on next drive with a 28-yard TD) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Vols even score with an 86-yard TD reception
videos.description: Nico Iamaleava goes deep to Dont'e Thornton Jr. for an 86-yard touchdown to even the score 14-14.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vols even score with an 86-yard TD reception) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tennessee scores go-ahead TD before halftime
videos.description: Nico Iamaleava darts one to Miles Kitselman for an 18-yard Tennessee go-ahead touchdown at the end of the first half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tennessee scores go-ahead TD before halftime) 2024/11/30 ESHEET
